next_steps: Immediate measurement of TSH, free T4, free T3, and total T3
Continuous EEG monitoring for subclinical seizure activity
CSF analysis for autoimmune encephalitis panel and paraneoplastic antibodies
Serum ammonia, electrolytes, and extended metabolic panel
Consider trial of intravenous thiamine and management for potential autonomic instability
Monitor for symptoms of autonomic dysregulation and hyperthermia (NMS signs)
